title: Codonanthopsis calcarata
taxonomy: Codonanthopsis calcarata is a member of the flowering plant family Boraginaceae. This classification places it within the order Boraginales, a group of flowering plants commonly known as forget-me-nots or borage. The Boraginaceae family is a diverse group of plants with approximately 2,000 species. The Boraginales order is part of the larger clade of asterids, a large group of flowering plants that also includes the orders Lamiales and Gentianales. Within the Boraginaceae family, Codonanthopsis calcarata is likely to be closely related to other species such as Codonanthopsis and Tournefortia.
